tasks.name: PingCheck
prompts: Append a newline character to ping.txt.
Append the time to a ping.txt

tasks.name: DailyNews_Mine
prompts: deep web mine UK news headlines for {today} into the GeneralNews domain using the top 10 articles from 5 news sources
deep web mine French news headlines for {today} into the GeneralNews domain
deep web mine EU news headlines for {today} into the GeneralNews domain

tasks.name: DailyNews_Analyse
prompts: Use the WebResearchAnalysis skill to create a daily summary for the GeneralNews domain for {today}, with topic 'UK, French, and EU news headlines', focus on the top 10 themes ranked by their geopolitical significance

tasks.name: DailyNews_Output
prompts: Save an HTML report for the GeneralNews domain for {today} using the dark template
